text: Could you repeat that, please?
I am not sure I understand. Could you explain?
Could you speak more slowly, please?
I am not sure how to say this in English.
Thank you for your patience.

Itinerary

Unforgettable
Rubens planned his itinerary. He traveled to his destination, Lisbon. He has already explored the old town. He has tried the local cuisine. He bought a souvenir to remember the journey.
Have you ever been to Lisbon?
I have already visited the castle.
I have not tried the cuisine yet.
I have never eaten that dish.
It has been an unforgettable journey.
Have you ever been to Portugal?
Lisbon is a beautiful destination.
Years ago, I lived in California.
I studied endocrinology there.
I have never tried Portuguese cuisine.
I have not seen the cathedral yet.

Two years ago, I went on the most unforgettable journey of my life. My destination was New Zealand. I had never been so far from home. I explored green mountains and quiet beaches, and I tried the local cuisine every day. I have visited many countries, but I have never seen a place so beautiful. I still keep a small souvenir from that trip on my desk.

This is my first journey to Lisbon, and it has been wonderful. I have already registered at the congress and visited the Belem Tower. But I haven't explored the old town yet, and I haven't tried the famous Portuguese cuisine. Tomorrow I want to buy a souvenir for my family. It has been an unforgettable destination.
Dr. Rubens! Have you ever been to Lisbon before?
No, this is my first time. It has been an unforgettable journey so far.
Wonderful! Have you explored the city yet?
I have already visited the Belem Tower, but I have not seen Alfama yet.
You must go! Have you tried the local cuisine?
Not yet. I have never eaten a real pastel de nata.
Oh, you have to! I have already eaten three today.
Three? That is a record! Have you bought any souvenirs?
Yes, I have already bought some for my family. Have you?
Not yet. A souvenir is on my itinerary for tomorrow.
This conference has been a wonderful destination.
It has. I have met wonderful colleagues and seen amazing places.
